CAFIA

Center for Africa

Financial Inclusion and Advancement

From Invisible to Investable

Learn MoreJoin the Movement

Seven Strategic Pillars

Addressing every aspect of financial inclusion across Africa

Research

Generating insights and studies to shape financial inclusion policies.

Data

Dashboards and tools tracking SME readiness and impact across Africa.

Academy

Building financial and business capacity at all levels.

Tech Lab

Developing digital tools to de-risk and scale inclusion.

Islamic Finance

Unlocking ethical, Shariah-compliant capital.

Advisory

Policy consulting, evaluations, and partnerships.

Health Inclusion

Integrating financial and health resilience.

Explore Strategic Pillars

Financial Inclusion in Sierra Leone

Empowering SMEs and entrepreneurs with access to financial services and opportunities

Freetown Street Markets

Where financial inclusion transforms daily commerce

Mobile Money in Action

Real transactions at Sierra Leone markets and vendor stalls

Urban Financial Infrastructure

Building services for Sierra Leone's growing urban centers

Financial Agents Network

Extending mobile banking to every community

Small Enterprise Development

Helping local businesses access formal financial services

Our Strategic Partners

Collaborating with leading institutions to drive financial inclusion across Africa

Limkokwing University

University of Creative Technology - Sierra Leone

Freetown Business Forum

A business hub driving growth - Sierra Leone

Be Noor Capital

CAFIA

Center for Africa Financial Inclusion and Advancement. Transforming Africa's informal sector into a catalyst for inclusive economic growth.
